revision.text: [[User:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] ([[User talk:{{{1}}}|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/{{{1}}}|contribs]] • [[Special:DeletedContributions/{{{1}}}|deleted contribs]] • [http://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/whois.ch?domain={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}&cache=off&email=on WHOIS] • [http://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/ptr.ch?ip={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}&cache=off&email=on RDNS] • [http://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/tracert.ch?ip={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}} trace] • [http://www.robtex.com/rbls/{{{1}}}.html RBLs] • [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}}} block log] • [{{fullurl:Special:Ipblocklist|action=unblock&ip={{{1}}}}} unblock]) {{documentation|content= {{tlx|IPunblock|127.0.0.1}} → {{IPunblock|127.0.0.1}} {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates|IPunblock]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
